activities_projects.title: Famous Scientists Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Learn about major contributors to science
steps: List at least five famous scientists
Write their discoveries and timeline
Draw a timeline showing evolution of science
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands key figures and milestones in science history

activities_projects.title: Science Discovery Poster
steps: Choose one important discovery (e.g., electricity, penicillin, telescope)
Draw illustration representing it
Write a short description of its impact
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes the importance and impact of scientific discoveries

activities_projects.title: Science in Daily Life Survey
steps: Observe daily life for items based on science (e.g., gadgets, medicines)
List and categorize them under physics, chemistry, biology
Present findings to class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how science impacts daily life
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and classification of examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Simple Experiment: Vinegar and Baking Soda
steps: Add a spoon of baking soda to a container
Pour vinegar over it
Observe the reaction and bubbles

activities_projects.title: Evolution of Scientific Tools
activities_projects.objective: Study how tools helped scientific progress
steps: Collect images of old and modern scientific tools
Compare their design and usage
Present findings in a table or chart
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of tools in science advancement
activities_projects.evaluation: Comparison table clarity and completeness (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Science and Inventions Role Play
steps: Choose a famous inventor or scientist
Prepare a short role play explaining their discovery
Perform in front of class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances understanding of scientists’ contributions and presentation skills

activities_projects.title: Science Word Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Reinforce key terms from the chapter
steps: List 10 key science terms (e.g., hypothesis, experiment, discovery)
Create a crossword or word search puzzle
Exchange with friends to solve
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Strengthens vocabulary and understanding of scientific terms

activities_projects.title: Observation of Natural Phenomena
steps: Observe a natural phenomenon (e.g., plant growth, rain formation)
Record observations for 3 days
Discuss findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances observation skills and scientific thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and detail of observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Science Quiz Competition
steps: Prepare 10 questions from the chapter
Conduct quiz in groups
Score points for correct answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Reinforces learning in an interactive way
activities_projects.evaluation: Quiz question quality and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Innovation Idea Sketch
steps: Think of a problem in daily life
Sketch an innovative solution or device
Explain how it works to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Stimulates creativity and application of science knowledge
activities_projects.evaluation: Originality and clarity of explanation (10 marks)
